description: Workflow to process pet entity details including setting default availability and fetching supplementary data
name: pet_details_workflow

transitions.description: Add default availability status if missing
transitions.end_state_description: Default availability status added to pet entity
transitions.name: add_default_availability

transitions.description: Fetch supplementary data asynchronously and update pet entity
transitions.end_state_description: Supplementary data fetched and pet entity updated
transitions.name: fetch_supplementary_data
transitions.start_state_description: Default availability status added to pet entity
